text:
In the quiet town of Willow Creek lived a famous painter. Every morning, she would wander through the local park. One day, she saw a young girl painting a bird. She stopped her.

"Young woman."

It took her years to recover that voice.

"To you."

"It's just an owl."

"Awl Ow?"



She loved painting birds.

The next year, an eagle took it.

She hung it at their cottage windows.

Every bird watcher loved it. 

Eventually, she asked a bird expert.

They said it was an ancient owl.

She smiled.

Years later, she saw an albino owl outside her door.

They became friends.

She named him Oliver.

They lived happily ever after.


That was her favorite story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
